topic: Riverton's new pilot converting vacant offices into affordable housing
audience: General public in Riverton and regional readers interested in housing and downtown recovery
objectives: Explain what the pilot does, who it serves, and how it works
Present benefits and concerns with balanced perspectives
Detail costs, timelines, accountability, and expected outcomes
Contextualize local efforts within broader trends
voice: Objective news reporting, neutral and accessible to a general audience
notes: Launch date: October 15, 2026. Include at least one statistic in the lead and attribute key facts to sources by [S#]. Avoid jargon; define necessary terms briefly.
